# Animal Report Template

Report:

- Animal Live / Animal Result Ledger / Shaper / State Study

Source:

- repo/path/API

Status:

- SHELL / LIVE / SETTLED / STALE

## Header Fields

- market id
- event id
- venue
- off time
- runner
- side
- DNA/state
- clips
- volume
- matched
- average entry
- SP
- ticks
- P/L
- result status

## Required Interpretive Fields

- same-market competing candidates
- favourite / second favourite rank
- best fill
- worst fill
- selected fill
- abstention reason if blocked
- settlement result if available
